title: Massive Voter Turnout In Tamil Nadu, Bengal Phase 1: DMK Eyes Second Term, TMC's Big Fight Against BJP
description: Voting for Tamil Nadu and West Bengal assembly elections (Phase 1) concluded on Thursday with both states registering an overwhelming turnout. In Bengal, the BJP has put up a strong fight against the ruling TMC, which is seeking its fourth term. In Tamil Nadu, where power has traditionally stayed with the two Dravidian parties, the DMK is seeking its second term.
